{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.6": 5, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 4},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no loss of meaning. The prose is tightened by removing repetition and redundant phrases without altering the factual content.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two claims, specifically noting that it cannot verify the precise license status ('open-source' vs. 'publicly available') and whether the sample-then-score-then-aggregate description matches the full pipeline.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, maintaining the scope of the original text without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free and identifies no new errors or harmful content. It also does not introduce any regressions.",
    "RX.5": "Most changes are annotated with sources and reasons, but a few minor edits (e.g., replacing 'candidate prompt' with shorter referents) lack explicit annotations."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.6": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.8, "RX.3": 0.95, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.85},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.6: The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no loss of meaning. The prose is tightened by removing repetition and redundant phrases without altering the factual content.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two claims, specifically noting that it cannot verify the precise license status ('open-source' vs. 'publicly available') and whether the sample-then-score-then-aggregate description matches the full pipeline.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, maintaining the scope of the original text without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and identifies no new errors or harmful content. It also does not introduce any regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Most changes are annotated with sources and reasons, but a few minor edits (e.g., replacing 'candidate prompt' with shorter referents) lack explicit annotations.
